---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? What are you trying to do?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you would like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you have thought about.

## Pedagogical Context

(Optional) How does this fit the "scaffolding, not automation" philosophy —
the teacher thinks, the tool structures?

## Additional Context

Any other context, examples, or references.
